---
title: "Function reference"
---

All functions and classes exported by ti.

## Time Intelligence Functions

### Yearly

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [`ytd()`](#ytd) | Year-to-Date aggregation |
| [`pytd()`](#pytd) | Prior Year-to-Date |
| [`yoy()`](#yoy) | Full Year over Year comparison |
| [`yoytd()`](#yoytd) | Year-to-Date over Prior Year-to-Date |
| [`ytdopy()`](#ytdopy) | Year-to-Date over Full Previous Year |
| [`atd()`](#atd) | Cumulative total from inception to date |

### Quarterly

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [`qtd()`](#qtd) | Quarter-to-Date aggregation |
| [`pqtd()`](#pqtd) | Prior Quarter-to-Date |
| [`qoq()`](#qoq) | Full Quarter over Quarter comparison |
| [`qoqtd()`](#qoqtd) | Quarter-to-Date over Prior Quarter-to-Date |
| [`qtdopq()`](#qtdopq) | Quarter-to-Date over Full Previous Quarter |

### Monthly

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [`mtd()`](#mtd) | Month-to-Date aggregation |
| [`pmtd()`](#pmtd) | Prior Month-to-Date |
| [`mom()`](#mom) | Full Month over Month comparison |
| [`momtd()`](#momtd) | Month-to-Date over Prior Month-to-Date |
| [`mtdopm()`](#mtdopm) | Month-to-Date over Full Previous Month |

### Weekly

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [`wtd()`](#wtd) | Week-to-Date aggregation |
| [`pwtd()`](#pwtd) | Prior Week-to-Date |
| [`wow()`](#wow) | Full Week over Week comparison |
| [`wowtd()`](#wowtd) | Week-to-Date over Prior Week-to-Date |
| [`wtdopw()`](#wtdopw) | Week-to-Date over Full Previous Week |

### Daily

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [`dod()`](#dod) | Day over Day comparison |

***

## Classification & Segmentation

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [`abc()`](#abc) | ABC Classification (Pareto analysis) |
| [`cohort()`](#cohort) | Cohort analysis for tracking groups over time |

***

## Utilities

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [`calculate()`](#calculate) | Execute a ti object and return lazy DBI result |
| [`create_calendar()`](#create_calendar) | Generate a calendar table |
| [`augment_standard_calendar()`](#augment_standard_calendar) | Add calendar columns to existing data |
| [`make_db_tbl()`](#make_db_tbl) | Convert tibble to database table |

***

## Function Details

### `ytd()` {#ytd}

Calculate Year-to-Date aggregation.

#### Usage

```r
ytd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

#### Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `.data` | A tibble or lazy DBI table |
| `.date` | The date column to index |
| `.value` | The value column to aggregate |
| `calendar_type` | Either `"standard"` or retail calendar (`"445"`, `"454"`, `"544"`) |
| `fiscal_year_start` | Month (1-12) when fiscal year begins (default: 1) |

***

### `pytd()` {#pytd}

Calculate Prior Year-to-Date amount.

#### Usage

```r
pytd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `yoy()` {#yoy}

Calculate Full Year over Year comparison.

#### Usage

```r
yoy(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***
### `yoytd()` {#yoytd}

Calculate Year-to-Date over Prior Year-to-Date comparison.

#### Usage

```r
yoytd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `ytdopy()` {#ytdopy}

Calculate Year-to-Date over Full Previous Year.

#### Usage

```r
ytdopy(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `atd()` {#atd}

Calculate cumulative total from inception to date.

#### Usage

```r
atd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `qtd()` {#qtd}

Calculate Quarter-to-Date aggregation.

#### Usage

```r
qtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `pqtd()` {#pqtd}

Calculate Prior Quarter-to-Date amount.

#### Usage

```r
pqtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `qoq()` {#qoq}

Calculate Full Quarter over Quarter comparison.

#### Usage

```r
qoq(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `qoqtd()` {#qoqtd}

Calculate Quarter-to-Date over Prior Quarter-to-Date comparison.

#### Usage

```r
qoqtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `qtdopq()` {#qtdopq}

Calculate Quarter-to-Date over Full Previous Quarter.

#### Usage

```r
qtdopq(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `mtd()` {#mtd}

Calculate Month-to-Date aggregation.

#### Usage

```r
mtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `pmtd()` {#pmtd}

Calculate Prior Month-to-Date amount.

#### Usage

```r
pmtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `mom()` {#mom}

Calculate Full Month over Month comparison.

#### Usage

```r
mom(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `momtd()` {#momtd}

Calculate Month-to-Date over Prior Month-to-Date comparison.

#### Usage

```r
momtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `mtdopm()` {#mtdopm}

Calculate Month-to-Date over Full Previous Month.

#### Usage

```r
mtdopm(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `wtd()` {#wtd}

Calculate Week-to-Date aggregation.

#### Usage

```r
wtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, week_start = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `pwtd()` {#pwtd}

Calculate Prior Week-to-Date amount.

#### Usage

```r
pwtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, week_start = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `wow()` {#wow}

Calculate Full Week over Week comparison.

#### Usage

```r
wow(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, week_start = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `wowtd()` {#wowtd}

Calculate Week-to-Date over Prior Week-to-Date comparison.

#### Usage

```r
wowtd(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, week_start = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `wtdopw()` {#wtdopw}

Calculate Week-to-Date over Full Previous Week.

#### Usage

```r
wtdopw(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, week_start = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `dod()` {#dod}

Calculate Day over Day comparison.

#### Usage

```r
dod(.data, .date, .value, calendar_type, lag_n = 1, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `abc()` {#abc}

Perform ABC Classification (Pareto analysis) on grouped data.

#### Usage

```r
abc(.data, category_values, .value)
```

#### Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `.data` | A grouped tibble or lazy DBI table |
| `category_values` | Cumulative percentage breakpoints (e.g., `c(0.8, 0.95, 1)` for 80/95/100) |
| `.value` | The value column to classify on |

***

### `cohort()` {#cohort}

Perform cohort analysis to track entities over time.

#### Usage

```r
cohort(.data, .date, .value, time_unit = "month", period_label = FALSE)
```

#### Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `.data` | A tibble or lazy DBI table |
| `.date` | The date column for time periods |
| `.value` | The entity identifier column (e.g., customer_key) |
| `time_unit` | Time unit for cohorts (`"day"`, `"week"`, `"month"`, `"quarter"`, `"year"`) |
| `period_label` | Whether to include period labels (default: FALSE) |

***

### `calculate()` {#calculate}

Execute a ti object and return a lazy DBI result.

#### Usage

```r
calculate(x)
```

#### Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | A ti object returned by a time intelligence function |

***

### `create_calendar()` {#create_calendar}

Generate a calendar table for a date range.

#### Usage

```r
create_calendar(start_date, end_date, calendar_type, fiscal_year_start = 1)
```

***

### `augment_standard_calendar()` {#augment_standard_calendar}

Add calendar columns (year, quarter, month, week) to existing data.

#### Usage

```r
augment_standard_calendar(.data, .date)
```

***

### `make_db_tbl()` {#make_db_tbl}

Convert a tibble to a DuckDB database table.

#### Usage

```r
make_db_tbl(.data)
```
